raw_consumer_statement: My credit card was stolen last XXXX while I was on vacation in XXXX. I didn't know until I came back on XX/XX/XXXX. I immediately went to the bank and asked for their help. My credit card was stolen XXXX dollars, the bank told me that I don't have to pay it back, and then I applied to close all my accounts. About a week later a stranger used my personal information to open another credit card at the bank. I don't know how he got my personal information, but he used the new credit card to charge another {$1500.00}. I then went to the bank and applied to close the account again. The bank assured me that there would be no mistakes this time. In XXXX of this year I received a bill for {$4000.00} from a debt collection agency and I was very angry. The bank assured me that the problem had been resolved.
